Vaz

I started out building bots just for fun, but that quickly turned into a full-time gig making apps and digital tools. Lately, I spend most of my time connecting different apps and APIs—mostly making things that link up community features, Roblox stuff, and handy scripts. When I’m not coding, I'm usually working out, hanging out with friends, or hitting the trails outdoors. I like keeping a good balance between screen time and real life, and I’m always down to learn new things and build cool new projects.

My Projects

Nora Bot

Nora is a modern Discord moderation and AI assistant bot designed around one simple rule: server data belongs to the server that created it. Integrated with custom Aura V10 AI engine, automated anti-raid shield, leveling system, and Roblox rank verification.

Open Nora

More Projects

Future tools, utilities, and security applications are currently under active design and development. Stay tuned for future releases.
